description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright and wearing military-style cargo pants with multiple pockets and suspenders crossing over a bare torso. The figure has a short, closely cropped hairstyle with shaved sides and a defined jawline. He wears tall, lace-up combat boots and a knee brace or pad on his right leg, suggesting readiness for physical activity or urban patrol. The suspenders are fastened with buckles at the front, and the pants are detailed with seams and utility pockets. His arms are relaxed at his sides, and his hands are open, with fingers slightly spread. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian, rugged style suitable for urban or tactical scenarios.
description: A muscular adult male in cargo pants, suspenders, and combat boots, standing upright with a bare torso and a short, shaved hairstyle. He features a knee brace and utility details, evoking a rugged, tactical look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bare torso, suspenders, cargo pants, combat boots, and knee brace on the right leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the suspenders, arm, and the side seam of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the crossed suspenders, back muscles, cargo pockets, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the knee brace, arm, and the side profile of the boots and pants.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style cargo pants with suspenders and a knee brace
